name: Okoy Shrimp-Tofu Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 cup of water and flour until smooth.
2. Add eggs, salt, and bean sprouts to the mixture. Stir thoroughly.
3. Heat a skillet or wok with 1/2 cup of oil.
4. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of the mixture into hot oil, ensuring fritters don't stick together.
5. When the bottom side of the fritters starts to brown, turn them over and fry until crisp and dry on paper towels.
6. Continue adding remaining oil as needed until all fritters are cooked.
7. Serve in a large dish with a saucer of dip.
